title: coaching — HTTP middleware
notes: Coaching does not publish middleware — resource-scope enforcement lives in policies + observers.

Verified-and-active gating for assignment creation lives in the CoachAssignmentObserver.creating hook (returns COACHING_PROFILE_NOT_VERIFIED / COACHING_PROFILE_INACTIVE). No middleware equivalent — the domain rule is more precise than a route-level guard.

Entitlement gating (coaching_capture / coaching_advanced_certifications / coaching_skill_ratings / coaching_multi_branch) enforced at the observer level — routes return 402 with the specific error code.
